name: title
title: My Awesome Project
subtitle: A 90-second narrated tour
narration: Welcome. This is a ninety second tour of my awesome project — what it does, how it's built, and why it matters.

name: architecture
title: Architecture
narration: At a high level, a request hits the router, which dispatches to one of three independently deployable services.

name: code
title: The core routing logic
subtitle: router.py — one decision, one dispatch
narration: The core is small: classify the request, and if confidence is low, ask instead of guessing. Otherwise dispatch to the chosen service.

name: features
title: What it does
bullets: Resilient — graceful fallback on every error path
Observable — structured traces on every request
Tested — full coverage of the critical paths
narration: It's fast, resilient, observable, and well tested — the four things I cared about most.

name: table
title: Requirements → implementation
narration: Every requirement maps cleanly to a file: routing, the services, observability, and the tests.

name: closing
title: Thanks for watching
narration: That's the tour. The repo has a runnable demo and tests. Thanks for watching.
